atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS 4 — registers a PostCSS plugin as a Tailwind plugin.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS 4 — defines static design tokens (colors, spacing, typography, etc.) that generate utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS 4 — defines a custom variant selector for use in utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS 4 — defines a custom utility class that participates in Tailwind's variant system.
